div.head: The Third Secretary of Embassy in Spain (Wendelin) to the Acting Secretary of State
div.p: X–332. Department’s telegrams No. 196, November 18, 3 p.m., and 199, November 19, 7 p.m.,Latter not printed. have been received. Guatemalan Chargé d’Affaires went to Valencia yesterday and reported to his Legation here today that he expects to reach satisfactory understanding regarding situation with Minister of State, as a result of which, he feels no special danger threatens Legation. Chilean Ambassador is representing Guatemalan interests here which, as reported, at present consist entirely of protection of Legation, Consulate and refugees therein. My good offices, if requested, would be used only in behalf of Guatemalan nationals or in support of representations to authorities to respect Legation.
